description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and deploy stages and variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS, ANDROID_TARGET_SDK. In the test stage add a unitTest:app job that uses the openjdk:8-jdk image, runs before_script commands chmod +x CI/android_sdk.sh, ./CI/android_sdk.sh, export ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/android-sdk-linux, chmod +x ./gradlew, then executes ./gradlew lint, ./gradlew --stacktrace test, ./gradlew testDebugUnitTestCoverage and cat app/build/reports/jacoco/testDebugUnitTestCoverage/html/index.html, and stores the app/build/reports/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a build job using the same image and before_script, runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, and publishes app/build/outputs/ as an artifact, running on runners tagged linux and docker. Also in the deploy stage add a pages job that moves the JaCoCo HTML report to a public/ folder, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and has no special tags or image.
